headlines.h: Markets React To: what a responsible cat mom
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-17)
The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
